analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises China for contributing to world peace and salutes Chinese peacekeeping soldiers. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned; no comparison or criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—explicitly credits China with maintaining world peace and highlights peacekeeping, aligning with China's cooperative, peace-focused international role. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; focus is international peacekeeping, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claim about governance or domestic achievements. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2 only.
